metadata.description: Rafayel's plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: rafayels-engineering
plugins.description: End-to-end feature workflow with brainstorm-plan-work-review-compound pipeline. 30 agents, 27 commands, 21 skills, 4 LSP servers. Pluggable orchestrator strategies, Obsidian vault researcher, track-based learnings schema. Stack: Go, TypeScript, SvelteKit, Python.
